summary: Tested Responsibilities feature in Tomich Gestão de Mídia - All tests passed. Backend: 17/17 pytest tests. Frontend: All CRUD operations working via UI (Create, Read, Update, Toggle, Delete).

issues: React DevTools warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - cosmetic only

passed_tests: BACKEND: GET /api/responsibilities returns 200
BACKEND: GET /api/responsibilities returns list with expected fields
BACKEND: GET /api/responsibilities?category=art filters by category
BACKEND: GET /api/responsibilities?active_only=true returns only active
BACKEND: POST /api/responsibilities creates new responsibility
BACKEND: POST /api/responsibilities with invalid member returns 404
BACKEND: POST /api/responsibilities validates required fields (422)
BACKEND: PUT /api/responsibilities/{id} updates responsibility
BACKEND: PUT /api/responsibilities/{id} with invalid id returns 404
BACKEND: PATCH /api/responsibilities/{id}/toggle toggles active status
BACKEND: PATCH /api/responsibilities/{id}/toggle with invalid id returns 404
BACKEND: DELETE /api/responsibilities/{id} removes responsibility
BACKEND: DELETE /api/responsibilities/{id} with invalid id returns 404
BACKEND: GET /api/responsibilities/{id} returns single responsibility
BACKEND: GET /api/responsibilities/{id} with invalid id returns 404
BACKEND: GET /api/responsibilities/by-member/{member_id} returns member's responsibilities
BACKEND: Full CRUD flow (Create->Read->Update->Toggle->Delete)
FRONTEND: Tab 'Responsabilidades' appears in Escalas page
FRONTEND: 3 initial responsibility cards displayed
FRONTEND: Statistics (Total, Ativas, Inativas) shown correctly
FRONTEND: 'Nova Responsabilidade' button opens creation dialog
FRONTEND: Creation dialog has all required fields (Title, Description, Category, Priority, Member, Frequency, Notes)
FRONTEND: Creating responsibility shows success toast and adds card
FRONTEND: Cards show category badge with correct colors
FRONTEND: Cards show priority badge (Baixa, Média, Alta)
FRONTEND: Cards show assigned member with avatar
FRONTEND: Cards show frequency (Sempre, Semanal, Mensal, Sob Demanda)
FRONTEND: Hover reveals action buttons (Edit, Toggle, Delete)
FRONTEND: Toggle button changes active status and shows 'Inativo' badge
FRONTEND: Toggle updates statistics correctly
FRONTEND: Edit button opens edit dialog with pre-filled values
FRONTEND: Edit dialog title changes to 'Editar Responsabilidade'
FRONTEND: Edit dialog 'Salvar' button saves changes
FRONTEND: Delete button removes card and updates statistics
FRONTEND: All operations show appropriate success toasts
seed_data_creation: 3 initial responsibilities exist in DB. Test created and deleted a responsibility during UI testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Responsibilities feature fully tested and working. Tab 'Responsabilidades' is the 4th tab in Escalas page (use data-testid='tab-responsibilities'). Cards display category/priority badges, member avatar, frequency. Hover reveals edit/toggle/delete buttons. All CRUD operations work correctly via API and UI.

feature_test_summary.responsibilities_tab_visible: PASS - Tab shows as 4th option in Escalas page
feature_test_summary.cards_display_correctly: PASS - Shows category, priority, member, frequency, notes
feature_test_summary.create_dialog_works: PASS - Opens on 'Nova Responsabilidade' click, all fields present
feature_test_summary.create_saves_data: PASS - Creates responsibility and shows in list with correct stats
feature_test_summary.hover_buttons_visible: PASS - Edit, Toggle, Delete buttons appear on card hover
feature_test_summary.toggle_changes_status: PASS - Toggles active/inactive, shows badge, updates stats
feature_test_summary.edit_updates_data: PASS - Opens edit dialog, saves changes, updates card
feature_test_summary.statistics_accurate: PASS - Total, Ativas, Inativas update correctly on all operations
